summary: SRC 4: Replaces Phase 2A status-based trigger with column-level immutability guard on lcs.movement_emission_intake. Adds reject_reason column. Blocks UPDATE on identity/evidence columns (emission_id, source_hub, movement_type_code, outreach_id, sovereign_id, evidence, dedupe_key, created_at). Allows: status, reject_reason, promoted_cid, error_id, processed_at. DELETE remains fully blocked. Adapts WP ingest_status reference to existing status column. 14 enforcement tests across 4 categories.

payload.schema_adaptation: WP referenced ingest_status; adapted to existing status from Phase 2A
